legacySkills.name: Sonic Solo

legacySkills.description: Activates only when equipped by Nightwing. Increases Nightwing's ATK by %. He gains % Physical PEN when dealing DMG with his Ultimate or the follow-up strike. If his Crit Rate is above 100%, every additional 1% grants 1% more Physical PEN, stacking up to %.

[Escape Trick]: When invlicted with a ctonrol effect, there is a fixed % chance to immediately remove it. Can only be triggered once per battle.

legacySkills.name: It Means Hope

legacySkills.name: Mystic Strike
legacySkills.description: Increases the wearer's Spiritual PEN by %. After casting the Ultimate, the wearer's ATK is permanently increased by %, stacking up to %.

legacySkills.description: Increases the wearer's Crit Rate by %. Upon casting the Ultimate, the wearer gains [Analyze Vulnerability]. [Analyze Vulnerability]: Increases Crit DMG by % for 8s.

legacySkills.name: Sharp Wind
legacySkills.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by % and Physical PEN by %.

legacySkills.name: Queen's Privilege

legacySkills.name: Protection of the Fates

After Wonder Woman Death Metal casts her Ultimate, she doesn't consume energy for [5s]. Her basic attacks deal additional physical damage equal to [%] of the target's Max HP (capped at [%] of Wonder Woman Death Metal's Attack.

legacySkills.description: Increases the wearer's Crit Rate by [%]. Upon casting the Ultimate, Crit Damage is increased by [%] for [35s], stacking up to [x] times.

Upon a successful dodge, Cassandra Cain immediately restores HP equl to [X]% of her Attack. Can trigger once every 2s.
